ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content of the item */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility score of the item in the outlet */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Dairy, Soft Drinks) */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* The brand of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* The broader category of the item */,
  "item_subcategory" TEXT /* The subcategory of the item */,
  "item_supplier" TEXT /* The supplier of the item */,
  "item_expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the item */,
  "item_manufacturing_date" TEXT /* The manufacturing date of the item */,
  "item_packaging_type" TEXT /* The type of packaging (e.g., Bottle, Box, Bag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_identifier")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlet was established */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Location type of the outlet */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of the outlet (e.g., Supermarket Type1) */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* The address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_city" TEXT /* The city where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_state" TEXT /* The state where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_country" TEXT /* The country where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_postal_code" TEXT /* The postal code of the outlet */,
  "outlet_phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* The email address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_manager_name" TEXT /* The name of the outlet manager */,
  "outlet_manager_contact" TEXT /* The contact information of the outlet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_identifier")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the item */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the outlet where the item is sold */,
  "item_outlet_sales" REAL /* Sales amount of the item in the outlet */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* The date of the sale */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* The discount applied to the sale */,
  "sale_total_amount" REAL /* The total amount of the sale after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_identifier", "outlet_identifier", "sale_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_visibility" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility record */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the item */,
  "visibility_score" REAL /* Visibility score of the item */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the visibility score was recorded */,
  "visibility_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the visibility score */,
  "visibility_duration" TEXT /* The duration for which the visibility score is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_visibility_item_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("item_identifier") REFERENCES items ("item_identifier")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the item */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the outlet */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "last_stock_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to reorder when the stock level reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* The expected date of the next reorder */,
  "shelving_location" TEXT /* The location of the item within the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_outlet_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_identifier") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_identifier"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("item_identifier") REFERENCES items ("item_identifier")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_fat_content_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fat content change record */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the item */,
  "new_fat_content" TEXT /* New fat content value */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the fat content was changed */,
  "old_fat_content" TEXT /* The previous fat content value */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the change in fat content */,
  "change_by" TEXT /* The person or system that made the change */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_fat_content_log_item_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("item_identifier") REFERENCES items ("item_identifier")
)
